rows.label: tev030601_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030601_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Staccata about his work.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030601_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030601_SEL0021
rows.name:
Ask Staccata if anything
is troubling him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030601_MSG0001
rows.name:
I perform corporeal maintenance
on on the Ma-non. In layman's
terms, I'm basically a doctor?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030601_MSG0002
rows.name: Did you come here for a checkup?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030601_MSG0003
rows.name:
I don't have any experience with mechanical
bodies like yours, you understand?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030601_MSG0004
rows.name:
If you are feeling under the
weather, perhaps you should
seek out a mechanic instead?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030601_MSG0012
rows.name:
Lately, I've had a surge in patients
complaining about stomach pains, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030601_MSG0013
rows.name:
Well, even after numerous rigorous
examinations, I don't think I'm any
closer to pinpointing the cause? However...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030601_MSG0014
rows.name:
Many of my patients claim to
have been cured by something
called the Bringer of Miracles?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030601_MSG0017
rows.name:
So in the interest of medical research, I took
it upon myself to visit this Mr. Bringer—and you
know what? It it it turns out he's not human![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030601_MSG0018
rows.name:
They really believe some invisible
being cured them? ...Perhaps more
than stomachs ail them, am I right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030601_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Staccata about Ma-non life cycles.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030601_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Staccata about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030601_SEL1031
rows.name: Ask Staccata about Blue Bloods.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030601_MSG0019
rows.name:
We Ma-non live a great number
of years, but we produce very
few children, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030601_MSG0020
rows.name:
Surely you've noted their absence from our
ship? That's because they're being cared
for and and protected on our homeworld...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030601_MSG0021
rows.name:
Of course, if we fail to find a way to escape the
confines of Mira, we'll have to more seriously
consider extending our species here, you understand?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030601_MSG0022
rows.name:
But we would just as soon wait until the Growth
threat has passed, I imagine? That's one advantage
of living long lives—we're never in a rush...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030601_MSG0028
rows.name:
When Fraisie left, I saw
several Ma-non go with her...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030601_MSG0031
rows.name:
I know the fiend has been
declawed, but it it still doesn't
sit right with me, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030601_MSG0032
rows.name:
Once I'm done treating the Ma-non she
inflicted that poison of hers on,
maybe I'll try to track them down?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030601_MSG0033
rows.name:
And if I find anything unsavory
is going on, I hope you will
be there to to help me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030601_MSG2010
rows.name:
It seems Fraisie believed the Bringer
of Miracles would come to her rescue
until the very end, don't you think?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030601_MSG2011
rows.name:
It should have been plain as day that
the xenoform was tricking her, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030601_MSG2012
rows.name:
The villain might even be hiding
among us as we speak, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030601_MSG2013
rows.name:
And and and who knows what form
it's taken? We must take care not
to miss even the tiniest detail![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030601_MSG2018
rows.name: Are you still in your mechanical body?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030601_MSG2019
rows.name:
Since you'd gone to the Central
Life, I just assumed you would
return with your real body, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030601_MSG2020
rows.name:
There go my hopes of carefully dissecting every
last limb and lymph node you possess, I suppose?
Er, figuratively speaking, of course...[ST:wait ]
